steps.title: Identify the possessive slot
steps.content: The blank comes before findings, so it must be a possessive determiner. It refers to Mercer and Wright, a plural pair, so the possessive must also be plural.

steps.title: Avoid contractions
steps.content: Choice A is the contraction for they are, Choice B is the contraction for it is, and Choice D is a singular possessive. The plural possessive determiner agrees with Mercer and Wright and fits before findings. The answer is C.
